generated_oml:
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring (temperature)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance LightingSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring (lighting)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LightingDataTransmitted
]

instance OccupancySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Sensors for environmental monitoring (occupancy)"
    DTDFVocab:producedData OccupancyDataTransmitted
]

instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance LightingDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LightingSensor
]

instance OccupancyDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom OccupancySensor
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature sensor data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance LightingData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Lighting sensor data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData LightingDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance OccupancyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Occupancy sensor data stream"
    DTDFVocab:fromData OccupancyDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono
]

instance RuntimeMetadata : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Runtime metadata for Eclipse Hono and Ditto integration"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseHono, EclipseDitto
]

instance ControlLogicSpecs : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Control logic specifications for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EclipseDitto
]

instance BuildingBIMModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "BIM-based model containing geometric, spatial, and functional data for the building infrastructure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo BIMTools
]

instance BIMTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "BIM tools for modeling building infrastructure"
]

instance EclipseHono : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono for IoT connectivity and data ingestion"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoring, PredictiveAnalytics
]

instance EclipseDitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto for digital twin management, device protocol handling, and model-driven automated deployment using Configurator"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveAnalytics, EnergyOptimization, VisualComfortManagement
]

instance UnrealEngine5 : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Unreal Engine 5 for interactive 3D visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables Interactive3DVisualization
]

instance RealTimeMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring of building environmental conditions"
]

instance PredictiveAnalytics : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for maintenance planning and energy efficiency using reinforcement learning for adaptive lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:provides MaintenancePlanningInsight, EnergyEfficiencyInsight
]

instance EnergyOptimization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Energy optimization for building systems"
    DTDFVocab:provides HVACControlAction
]

instance VisualComfortManagement : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Visual comfort management for lighting control"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustLightingAction
]

instance Interactive3DVisualization : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization using Unreal Engine 5"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualInsight
]

instance MaintenancePlanningInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for maintenance planning"
]

instance EnergyEfficiencyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predictive insights for energy efficiency"
]

instance VisualInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Interactive 3D visualization of building infrastructure"
]

instance HVACControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust HVAC for energy optimization"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance AdjustLightingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action to adjust lighting for visual comfort"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) for lighting adjustment"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Actuators and controllers within Building Control Systems (BCS) for HVAC adjustment"
]

instance BuildingEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Building infrastructure environment for the Living Lab facility"
    base:contains TemperatureSensor, LightingSensor, OccupancySensor, LightingActuator, HVACActuator
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control signals generated by the DT to adjust Building Control Systems (BCS) actuators, such as lighting intensity or HVAC settings, based on simulation and optimization results."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization between physical and virtual components for continuous data exchange and response."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular service-oriented architecture with BIM as semantic backbone, integrated with Eclipse Hono/Ditto for data exchange, Unreal Engine for visualization, and standardized extension points for service integration."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Covers all building life cycle stages from initial design through construction, operation, and refurbishment phases."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Measured using Overall Digital Twin Entanglement (ODTE) metric; synchronization techniques to prevent semantic drift between digital and physical counterparts."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono and Ditto for real-time data exchange (specific protocols not detailed in document)."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Integration with IoT platforms via Hono/Ditto and semantic interoperability across BIM-based systems and external data sources."
]
